languages.text: Из священной Камеры Патента пропала самая ценная реликвия династии фон Валанциус, дающая ей все права и свободы, лежащие в самой ее основе. Без Торгового Патента династии все равно что не существует. Его возвращение — залог продолжения вашего существования как Вольного Торговца.

The Warrant of Trade, the most valuable relic of the von Valancius dynasty, which confers all its most fundamental rights and liberties, has vanished from its sacred chamber. Without the Warrant, the dynasty simply cannot exist. Its recovery is essential if you wish to remain a Rogue Trader.
languages.original_text: Из священной палаты Патента пропала самая ценная реликвия династии фон Валанциус, дающая ей все права и свободы, лежащие в самой ее основе. Без Торгового Патента династии все равно что не существует. Его возвращение — залог продолжения вашего существования как Вольного Торговца.

traits.locale_text: The Warrant of Trade, the most valuable relic of the von Valancius dynasty, which confers all its most fundamental rights and liberties, has vanished from its sacred chamber. Without the Warrant, the dynasty simply cannot exist. Its recovery is essential if you wish to remain a Rogue Trader.

The Warrant of Trade, the most valuable relic of the von Valancius dynasty, which confers all its most fundamental rights and liberties, has vanished from its sacred chamber. Without the Warrant, the dynasty simply cannot exist. Its recovery is essential if you wish to remain a Rogue Trader.

The Warrant of Trade, the most valuable relic of the von Valancius dynasty, which confers all its most fundamental rights and liberties, has vanished from its sacred chamber. Without the Warrant, the dynasty simply cannot exist. Its recovery is essential if you wish to remain a Rogue Trader.

languages.text: フォン・ヴァランキウス家の最も貴重な遺産である「貿易証書」は、その最も基本的な権利と自由を授けるものであり、聖なる部屋から消えてしまった。証書なしでは、フォン・ヴァランキウス家は存在できない。もしあなたがローグトレーダーとして生き続けるのであれば、証書の回収は不可欠である。
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade, the most valuable relic of the von Valancius dynasty, which confers all its most fundamental rights and liberties, has vanished from its sacred chamber. Without the Warrant, the dynasty simply cannot exist. Its recovery is essential if you wish to remain a Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: フォン・ヴァランキウス家の最も貴重な遺産である「貿易証書」は、その最も基本的な権利と自由を授けるものであり、聖なる部屋から消えてしまった。証書なしでは、フォン・ヴァランキウス家は存在できない。もしあなたがローグトレーダーとして生き続けるのであれば、証書の回収は不可欠である。

languages.text: La Patente de Comercio, la reliquia más valiosa de la dinastía von Valancius, que le otorga sus derechos y libertades más fundamentales, ha desaparecido de su cámara sagrada. Sin la Patente, la dinastía no puede existir. Debes recuperarla si no quieres perder el cargo de Comerciante Independiente.
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade, the most valuable relic of the von Valancius dynasty, which confers all its most fundamental rights and liberties, has vanished from its sacred chamber. Without the Warrant, the dynasty simply cannot exist. Its recovery is essential if you wish to remain a Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: La Patente de Comercio, la reliquia más valiosa de la dinastía von Valancius, que le otorga sus derechos y libertades más fundamentales, ha desaparecido de su cámara sagrada. Sin la Patente, la dinastía no puede existir. Debes recuperarla si no quieres perder el cargo de Comerciante Independiente.

languages.text: Der Handelsbrief, das wertvollste Relikt der Dynastie derer von Valancius, der ihre fundamentalen Rechte und Freiheiten festschreibt, ist aus seiner heiligen Kammer verschwunden. Ohne den Handelsbrief kann die Dynastie nicht existieren. Seine Wiederbeschaffung ist essentiell, wenn du {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin} bleiben willst.
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade, the most valuable relic of the von Valancius dynasty, which confers all its most fundamental rights and liberties, has vanished from its sacred chamber. Without the Warrant, the dynasty simply cannot exist. Its recovery is essential if you wish to remain a Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: Der Handelsbrief, das wertvollste Relikt der Dynastie derer von Valancius, der ihre fundamentalen Rechte und Freiheiten festschreibt, ist aus seiner heiligen Kammer verschwunden. Ohne den Handelsbrief kann die Dynastie nicht existieren. Seine Wiederbeschaffung ist essentiell, wenn du {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin} bleiben willst.

languages.text: La lettre de marque, précieuse relique conférant à la dynastie von Valancius tous ses droits et devoirs, a disparu de sa salle sacrée. Sans lettre de marque, la dynastie est vouée à disparaître. Vous devez à tout prix la retrouver si vous souhaitez rester {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}.
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade, the most valuable relic of the von Valancius dynasty, which confers all its most fundamental rights and liberties, has vanished from its sacred chamber. Without the Warrant, the dynasty simply cannot exist. Its recovery is essential if you wish to remain a Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: La lettre de marque, précieuse relique conférant à la dynastie von Valancius tous ses droits et devoirs, a disparu de sa salle sacrée. Sans lettre de marque, la dynastie est vouée à disparaître. Vous devez à tout prix la retrouver si vous souhaitez rester {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}.

languages.text: 贸易授状——冯·瓦兰修斯王朝最为珍贵的圣物，赋予其一切根本权利与自由的凭证——已从神圣密室中消失。失去贸易授状，王朝将无从存续。若你仍希望保有行商浪人之名，寻回授状至关重要。
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade, the most valuable relic of the von Valancius dynasty, which confers all its most fundamental rights and liberties, has vanished from its sacred chamber. Without the Warrant, the dynasty simply cannot exist. Its recovery is essential if you wish to remain a Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: 贸易授状——冯·瓦兰修斯王朝最为珍贵的圣物，赋予其一切根本权利与自由的凭证——已从神圣密室中消失。失去贸易授状，王朝将无从存续。若你仍希望保有行商浪人之名，寻回授状至关重要。

languages.text: Von Valancius hanedanlığının en temel haklarını ve özgürlüklerini bahşeden en değerli yadigârı Ticari Ruhsatname, kutsal odasından kayboldu. Ruhsatname olmadan hanedanlık var olamaz. Hür Tacir kalmak istiyorsan Ruhsatname'yi geri almaya mecbursun.
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade, the most valuable relic of the von Valancius dynasty, which confers all its most fundamental rights and liberties, has vanished from its sacred chamber. Without the Warrant, the dynasty simply cannot exist. Its recovery is essential if you wish to remain a Rogue Trader.
